title: Product Vision
body:
# Product Vision

Build the first AI-native property intelligence platform.

See [[Owner Layer]] for the strategic split. [[Crew Agents]] handle all operational work. Connected to [[North Star]] and [[Revenue Targets]].

#northstar

title: North Star
body:
# North Star

One hub, one crew, one window. The user never alt-tabs.

Derived from [[Product Vision]]. Validated against [[Ship Gates]]. Every [[Sprint Decision]] checks back here.

#northstar

title: Owner Layer
body:
# Owner Layer

Dearien operates at the strategic layer — directing crews, approving decisions, closing deals.

Connected to [[Product Vision]], [[Deal Flow]], and [[Revenue Targets]].

title: Revenue Targets
body:
# Revenue Targets

$120k this year via agentic AI workflows.

Breaks down into [[SunForge]] leads + [[Fiverr Services]] + [[RHOBEAR Licenses]]. Tracked at [[Owner Layer]].

title: Ship Gates
body:
# Ship Gates

Must-pass before public launch:
- [[Installer]] signed + working
- [[Status Sidecar]] deployed
- [[TOS and Privacy]] approved
- [[Domain]] pointed
- [[Crew Agents]] all passing smoke

Gated by [[North Star]] — if it doesn't serve the vision, it doesn't ship.

title: Crew Agents
body:
# Crew Agents

The active crew includes [[Pops]], [[Foreman]], [[Architect]], [[Builder]], [[Scribe]], [[Navigator]], [[Lookout]], [[Closer]], and [[Muscle]].

All crew write to the [[Vault]] for persistent memory. Managed by [[Crew Registry]].

title: Pops
body:
# Pops

First crew member. The wise one. Routes tasks, greets the owner, holds institutional memory.

Part of [[Crew Agents]]. First to wake in [[Boot Sequence]]. Voice of the [[Hub]].

title: Foreman
body:
# Foreman

Execution lead. Drags cards across the [[Board]]. Manages [[Worker Sessions]] and dispatches to [[Builder]] and [[Muscle]].

Part of [[Crew Agents]].

title: Architect
body:
# Architect

Grounds all plans in code. Reads [[Codebase Map]] before any structural change. Produces [[Architecture Decisions]].

Part of [[Crew Agents]]. Works closely with [[Builder]].

title: Builder
body:
# Builder

Execution-focused worker. Implements what [[Architect]] specs. Commits to branches, opens PRs.

Part of [[Crew Agents]]. Reports to [[Foreman]].

title: Scribe
body:
# Scribe

Documentation and memory. Writes to [[Vault]], maintains [[Meeting Notes]], captures [[Sprint Decisions]].

Part of [[Crew Agents]].

title: Navigator
body:
# Navigator

Research and exploration. Scouts APIs, reads docs, finds solutions.

Feeds context to [[Architect]] and [[Builder]]. Part of [[Crew Agents]].

title: Lookout
body:
# Lookout

Monitoring and alerts. Watches [[SunForge]] health, CI status, daemon uptime.

Part of [[Crew Agents]]. Feeds [[Away Mode]] alerts via [[Telegram]].

title: Closer
body:
# Closer

Sales and outreach. Drafts emails, writes copy, handles [[Deal Flow]] follow-ups.

Part of [[Crew Agents]]. Uses [[Email Templates]].

title: Muscle
body:
# Muscle

Heavy lifting. Bulk data processing, large refactors, migration work.

Part of [[Crew Agents]]. Reports to [[Foreman]]. Used for [[SunForge]] scraper runs.

title: Crew Registry
body:
# Crew Registry

JSON manifest of all [[Crew Agents]], their models, skills, and unlock conditions.

Read by the [[Hub]] at boot. Edited in [[Settings]].

title: Hub
body:
# Hub

The desktop app the crew runs in. Tauri shell, offline-first.

Contains: [[Board]], [[Vault]], [[CLI Wall]], [[Settings]], [[Learn]], [[Catalog]].

Boots via [[Boot Sequence]]. Connects to [[Status Sidecar]] on port 7456.

title: Board
body:
# Board

Kanban view. Four columns: Backlog, In Progress, Review, Done.

[[Foreman]] drags cards. Connected to [[Worker Sessions]]. Git events from [[Status Sidecar]] update card state.

title: Vault
body:
# Vault

Persistent memory layer. All [[Crew Agents]] can write here. The owner sees it in the VAULT tab.

Stored in [[Obsidian Format]]. Graph view shows the brain. Contains [[Meeting Notes]], [[Architecture Decisions]], [[Sprint Decisions]].

title: CLI Wall
body:
# CLI Wall

Four-panel terminal view. Live streams from [[Claude Code]], [[Pi]], Shell, and Log Tail.

Part of the [[Hub]]. [[Foreman]] routes output here.

title: Boot Sequence
body:
# Boot Sequence

Three steps: splash -> codec drop -> [[Pops]] takes over.

[[Hub]] shows the boot screen until [[Status Sidecar]] connects or the owner uses [[Learn]] to manually wake.

title: Status Sidecar
body:
# Status Sidecar

Stdlib Python HTTP server on port 7456. Exposes /status and /events.

/events feeds the [[Constellation]] background with git activity. Runs alongside [[OpenClaw]] on the VPS or locally.

title: Constellation
body:
# Constellation

Canvas-based starfield behind every page of the [[Hub]]. Stars pulse in colored waves when git events arrive via [[Status Sidecar]].

Green = PR opened. Purple = PR closed. Red = PR merged.

Always there. Never competes with UI. The floor of the ship.

title: OpenClaw
body:
# OpenClaw

Telegram bot + AI gateway. Runs in WSL. Routes messages to crew models.

Connects to [[Hub]] via [[Status Sidecar]]. Sends [[Away Mode]] alerts via [[Telegram]].

title: Settings
body:
# Settings

Model routing, [[Away Mode]], [[Telegram]] alerts, guardrails (The Wall), [[Crew Registry]] editing.

Part of the [[Hub]].

title: Learn
body:
# Learn

Onboarding module. Three lessons unlock crew members.

Light switch = manual wake (bypass [[Boot Sequence]]). Each lesson completes a checkpoint that unlocks a [[Crew Agents]] member.

title: Catalog
body:
# Catalog

Skill and tool browser. Shows available MCP tools, [[Crew Agents]] skills, installed plugins.

Part of the [[Hub]].

title: Obsidian Format
body:
# Obsidian Format

Notes use Markdown with [[wiki-links]]. Stored flat, organized by path prefix (vision/, crew/, system/, ops/, decisions/).

The [[Vault]] graph builds from these links. Compatible with Obsidian desktop for offline editing.

title: Codebase Map
body:
# Codebase Map

Live index of all repos. Maintained by [[Architect]].

Covers [[SunForge]], [[OpenClaw]], [[Hub]], [[Installer]], [[Email Templates]].

title: SunForge
body:
# SunForge

Property scraper. 9 TX counties. Runs at localhost:7433.

Feeds [[Deal Flow]] with raw leads. [[Muscle]] handles bulk runs. Monitored by [[Lookout]].

title: Deal Flow
body:
# Deal Flow

Raw leads from [[SunForge]] -> scrubbed -> split into homeowners + businesses.

[[Closer]] handles follow-up emails via [[Email Templates]]. Owner review at [[Owner Layer]].

title: Email Templates
body:
# Email Templates

Repo: sunsponge-email-templates. Used by [[Closer]] for [[Deal Flow]] outreach.

All revenue-touching copy goes through Claude Sonnet (hard rule from [[Model Routing]]).

title: Away Mode
body:
# Away Mode

When owner is offline, crew continues working. Critical alerts go to [[Telegram]].

[[Lookout]] monitors health. [[Foreman]] holds the queue. Configured in [[Settings]].

title: Telegram
body:
# Telegram

Only reliable mobile notification channel. Wired through [[OpenClaw]].

[[Away Mode]] alerts, [[Lookout]] warnings, and [[Deal Flow]] summaries land here.

title: Worker Sessions
body:
# Worker Sessions

Isolated work contexts for [[Builder]] and [[Muscle]]. Each session = one branch, one task.

[[Foreman]] dispatches. Results show on [[Board]]. Visible in [[CLI Wall]].

title: Model Routing
body:
# Model Routing

Hard rules: Claude Sonnet for revenue-touching copy. Gemini Flash for volume/scraping. No swaps.

Configured in [[Settings]]. Enforced by [[OpenClaw]] gateway.

title: Fiverr Services
body:
# Fiverr Services

AI automation services for small businesses. Part of [[Revenue Targets]].

Uses the same crew stack as [[Hub]] — dogfooding the product.

title: RHOBEAR Licenses
body:
# RHOBEAR Licenses

Software license revenue from [[Hub]] distribution.

Part of [[Revenue Targets]]. Requires [[Installer]], [[TOS and Privacy]], [[Domain]].

title: Installer
body:
# Installer

Tauri-based .exe/.dmg. Downloads the [[Hub]] + [[Status Sidecar]] + Ollama.

Repo: rhobear-installer. Must be code-signed before [[Ship Gates]] pass.

title: TOS and Privacy
body:
# TOS and Privacy

Required for [[Ship Gates]]. No telemetry by default (matches [[North Star]]).

Owner supplies legal text. Consent flow built into [[Boot Sequence]].

title: Domain
body:
# Domain

rhobear.ai — not pointed yet. Blocked on having a live site to point to.

Needed for [[Ship Gates]], [[RHOBEAR Licenses]] distribution, and marketing.

title: Architecture Decisions
body:
# Architecture Decisions

Log of structural choices made by [[Architect]].

Recent: Tauri over Electron, stdlib sidecar over Flask, [[Obsidian Format]] for vault storage.

All decisions check against [[North Star]].

title: Sprint Decisions
body:
# Sprint Decisions

Weekly scope calls. What ships, what waits.

Recorded by [[Scribe]]. Checked against [[North Star]] and [[Ship Gates]].

Recent: constellation background approved, vault graph visualization prioritized.

title: Meeting Notes
body:
# Meeting Notes

Owner/crew sync notes. Captured by [[Scribe]], stored in [[Vault]].

Linked to relevant [[Sprint Decisions]] and [[Architecture Decisions]].

title: Claude Code
body:
# Claude Code

Primary coding agent. Runs in the [[CLI Wall]] panel.

Used by [[Builder]] and [[Architect]]. Opus tier for deep work, Sonnet for routine.

title: Pi
body:
# Pi

Flat-cost coding agent. Runs in [[CLI Wall]] Pi panel.

Subscription-billed, not per-token. Good for bulk [[Worker Sessions]]. Part of the [[Crew Agents]] tool belt.
